evidence.scientific_clarity: Forest plot fully satisfies brief: 12 study rows with CI lines, inverse-variance-weighted square markers, red diamond for pooled fixed-effect, dashed null line at log OR=0.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=0 set anywhere in script; text will be Type 3 (bitmapped) in PDF/SVG; default DejaVu Sans font used throughout.
evidence.palette: Study color #2166ac (blue) and pooled color #d6604d (red-orange) are from ColorBrewer diverging palette; distinguishable under common colorblindness types; no green/red directional misuse.
evidence.layout_density: figsize=(7, 6.75) for 12 studies is reasonable; annotation box anchored at xmax/y_pooled may overlap CI whiskers of wide-interval studies; tight_layout() applied.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content and includes numerical claim; no explicit legend (blue=study, red=pooled conveyed only via annotation box and y-axis label); annotation box is redundant with pooled y-tick label.
evidence.vector_fidelity: figure.pdf is saved but script never sets matplotlib.rcParams['pdf.fonttype']=42, so text is stored as Type 3 outlines rather than selectable TrueType glyphs.
evidence.file_format: All required files present and non-trivial: figure.pdf, figure.png, caption.tex, gen_figure.py; bonus figure.svg also generated.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption names all visual elements (squares, CI lines, diamond, dashed line), states the pooled OR=0.245 (95% CI [0.196, 0.294]) explicitly, and honestly notes I² was unavailable.

overall_strengths: Complete and correct forest-plot implementation: weighted markers, diamond pooled estimate, null line, and separator all present as specified in the brief.
Caption is publication-quality with a specific numerical finding and transparent acknowledgment of missing heterogeneity statistic.
overall_weaknesses: Missing pdf.fonttype=42 (and svg.fonttype=0) means text in the PDF/SVG is not selectable or editable — a hard requirement for most journals.
Default DejaVu Sans font and no explicit rcParams font configuration; annotation box placement risks crowding the pooled row and is redundant with the y-axis pooled label.
